task: F0064 wide-load GEMV rewrite - same-session before/after A/B
build: same F0064 sources as V1, rebuilt with -DRWKV7_GEMV_KUNROLL2 for BOTH extensions (rwkv7_fast + rwkv7_mega). Flag injected via a strictly-scoped sitecustomize shim on torch cpp_extension.load (inert unless its env flag is set; the loaders hardcode extra_cuda_cflags so a plain NVCC env var would not be recorded); presence verified in both extensions' build.ninja cuda_cflags before any measurement, and re-verified after the e2e legs (no silent rebuild).
